description: PR2 scenario #4 — every eligible room is occupied at the target slot. Gender, type, and capacity all match; the rooms exist and would accept the section on any other slot, but at (day=Sun, start=08:00) every candidate room is already busy. Expected reason: ROOM_OCCUPIED.
notes: Conceptually distinct from NO_ROOM_CAPACITY: rooms CAN hold this section, just not at this slot. Often the right mitigation is slot reassignment, not room expansion.
Today rooming site 3 emits silent UNASSIGNED; the oracle splits this case out so operators can distinguish 'slot full' from 'not enough rooms'.
